description: Northwind Traders is onboarding its first employee, a warehouse worker named Maria Anders. Set up the payroll system and issue the first monthly payslip. Enable the Employees, Payslip Items, and Payslips modules. Create a Payslip Item named 'Gross Salary' as an Earnings/Addition type and another named 'Income Tax Withholding' as a Deduction type. Create an employee record for 'Maria Anders'. Generate and save a payslip for Maria Anders dated 2025-01-31, including the 'Gross Salary' of 4,500.00 and 'Income Tax Withholding' of 675.00.
